prompt_text: Lu Shuyi, a frail young noblewoman in ancient Chinese attire, pale skin, watery downturned almond eyes, slim delicate figure, black hair in an elegant traditional updo, light pink silk hanfu with gauze layers, stands just one step inside the threshold holding a pale invitation card tightly at her chest, her narrow shoulders slightly drawn inward, expression startled yet composed, not pleading, seen from Gao Lingning's limited subjective view. A noble banquet hall doorway framed tightly by the doorframe, foreground right blocked by a blurred guest's shoulder creating a voyeuristic obstructed view, mid shot composition with Lu Shuyi slightly left of center, cool daylight from outside meeting the warm amber-red wedding interior behind her, blurred festive ornaments and old wood architecture marking the boundary between exterior sky light and interior ceremony. Low-saturation warm-cool contrast, restrained historical drama realism, Song dynasty aesthetics, cinematic photography, subtle film grain, shallow depth of field, tension of intrusion and guarded first sight
